# sakura_monitoring_suite_metric_storage (Data Source)

Get information about an existing Monitoring Suite Metric Storage.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "sakura_monitoring_suite_metric_storage" "foobar" {
  name = "foobar"
  # or
  # id = "metric-storage-resource-id"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Optional

- `id` (String) The ID of the Monitoring Suite Metric Storage.
- `name` (String) The name of the Monitoring Suite Metric Storage.

### Read-Only

- `created_at` (String) The creation timestamp of the Monitoring Suite Metric Storage
- `description` (String) The description of the Monitoring Suite Metric Storage.
- `endpoints` (Attributes) The endpoints of the Metric Storage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--endpoints))
- `is_system` (Boolean) The flag to indicate whether this is a system Metric Storage.
- `project_id` (String) The project ID of the Metric Storage.
- `resource_id` (String) The resource ID of the Metric Storage.
- `usage` (Attributes) The usage of the Metric Storage. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--usage))

<a id="nestedatt--endpoints"></a>
### Nested Schema for `endpoints`

Read-Only:

- `address` (String) The address of the Metric Storage endpoint.


<a id="nestedatt--usage"></a>
### Nested Schema for `usage`

Read-Only:

- `alert_rules` (Number) The number of Alert Rules.
- `log_measure_rules` (Number) The number of Log Measure Rules.
- `metric_routings` (Number) The number of Metric Routings.
